author: நக்கீரர் / Nakkirar
scope: Tamil text, transliteration and compiled explanatory material.
useInRelease: Primary literary witness for the six Murugan landscapes and abodes.
qualityNote: This uploaded file is treated as a transcription/compilation, not as a critical scholarly edition. Release 147 cites precise internal headings and verse ranges and avoids unsupported historical claims.

author: Work-level attribution required; Kanda Sashti Kavasam section attributed to ஸ்ரீ தேவராய சுவாமிகள் / Sri Devaraya Swamigal
sourceType: Section inside a mixed user-uploaded Murugan devotional compilation
editionType: Uploaded compilation container; not a standalone critical edition
scope: The uploaded container includes Kanda Sashti Kavasam and other Murugan devotional works. Each work must retain its own author attribution.
useInRelease: Source witness only for the reviewed Kanda Sashti Kavasam opening extract.
qualityNote: The filename identifies the uploaded container, not the literary identity or authorship of every work inside it. This record does not attribute Kavasam literature to Nakkirar or to Thirumurugatruppadai.

author: அருணகிரிநாதர் / Arunagirinathar
scope: Numbered Thiruppugazh corpus with venue, rhythmic and song-text headings.
useInRelease: Primary source for the first ten manually checked digital song records in Release 149.
qualityNote: Release 149 publishes only manually checked song texts. OCR-only text and unverified commentary are not published.

author: ஸ்ரீமத் சத்குரு சாந்தானந்த சுவாமிகள்
sourceType: Skanda Guru Kavasam section inside a mixed user-uploaded Murugan devotional compilation
editionType: Uploaded compilation container; not a standalone critical edition
scope: Opening invocation and the numbered text extending beyond line 380.
useInRelease: Source witness for the manually checked opening invocation and lines 1–20 in Release 151.
qualityNote: The container filename does not define this work's authorship. The internal heading attributes Skanda Guru Kavasam to Srimath Sadguru Santhananda Swamigal. Release 151 publishes only the verified opening extract.
